figures.caption: Figure 3: Sample paths of the risky asset and the associated optimal investment strategies πB and π∗, α = −1 and β = −50.

Figure 7: Optimal final wealth X∗ as a function of S(T ), T = 1, Gaussian prior.
Figure 1: Density of the terminal wealth X∗ for different values of α and β, discrete prior, T = 0.25. The case α = β represents the ambiguity neutral setting of Section 3.1 with parameter α.
Figure 6: Distribution of the terminal wealth X∗ for different values of α and β, Gaussian prior, T = 1. The case α = β represents the ambiguity neutral setting of Section 3.1 with parameter α.

Figure 2: Optimal final wealth X∗ as a function of S(T ), T = 0.25, discrete prior.
